calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Special Administration And For Order Approving Compensation Of Attorneys To Special Administrator.
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-294940 The Walter and Linda Lembi Family Trust.

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Martin Goodman.

Mr. Skootksy and Mr. Goodman stated that the Bankruptcy Trustee is challenging/trying to claim their assets, that there is no valuation on the interest in the property and that all they can do is try to wrap things up and turn over any assets to the IRS. Mr. Skootksy also requested continuing the Trusteeship for 60 day and stated that they hope to do a Petition for Final Distribution and present some form of settlement for Court approval. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken off calendar. The Petition for Termination of Special Administration was granted (subject to review of the order). The Trust matter was continued to September 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition To File Late Claim
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Denied

Off Calendar May-02-2012 Continued To May-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To File Late Claim
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Continued To May-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To File Late Claim.

Petition To File Late Claim
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Continued To Apr-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To File Late Claim
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Continued To Mar-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Continued To Jul-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-294940 The Walter and Linda Lembi Family Trust.

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Martin Goodman. Andrew Neilson for C.W. Capitol Asset Management (Creditor).

Mr. Skootsky stated that his Client was unable to locate any assets of the Estate, that all of the Creditor's had been given notice and addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to allowance of Special Administrator's fees at Attorney rates, approving Estate fees from the Trust and overlap of billings in the Estate and the Trust. Status to see if any other Party wants to serve was taken off calendar. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Compensation of Trustee, etc. (subject to further review of the Court as to any further reductions and review of the order). Status on appointment of a permanent Trustee was set for July 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration and the Petition for Termination of Special Administration, etc. were continued to July 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The temporary Trustee will continue to serve until that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Termination Of Special Administration And For Order Approving Compensation Of Attorneys To Special Administrator.
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Continued To Jul-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-294940 The Walter and Linda Lembi Family Trust.

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Martin Goodman (Special Administrator/Temporary Trustee) and for Deutsche Bank.

Judge Wiss recused herself from hearing these matters. The matters were continued to January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The letters of Special Administration and powers of the Temporary Trustee are also extended to that date (orders to be signed by another Judicial Officer).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Continued To Oct-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-294940 The Walter and Linda Lembi Family Trust.

Appearances: Seth Skootsy for and with Martin Goodman (Trust Matter). Seth Skootsky for Deutsche Bank (Estate Matter). Robert Green for New York Life.

The Court granted the Petition to Appoint Temporary Trustee (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $135,000.00. Further status to see if any other appointed/named Party wants to serve was set for October 31, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration was also continued to October 31, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Contreras.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Continued To Sep-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Martin Goodman.

Ms. Skootsky stated that it was not clear as to whether there will be a new Petitioner in the Probate petition and requested a continuance for Mr. Goodwin to come to conclusion with regard to the assets. In addition, Mr. Skootsky stated that Mr. Goodwin contacted Mr. Lembi former Attorney and Accountant, that Mr. Goodwin is receiving cooperation fromthem, that there appears to be no probate assets but there appear to be some assets in the Revocable Living Trust and that Mr. Goodwin needs to be able to extend his search beyond the probate action to look into the family law documents and the tax returns. The Petition to Amend Powers of Special Administrator was taken under submission. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to September 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an additional report which is to be filed September 19, 2011.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition To Amend Powers Of Special Administrator Martin D. Goodman, Esq.
Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Continued To Aug-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootksy for Deutsche Bank. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Martin Goodman (proposed Special Administrator) also present.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he waived notice and the Public Administrator was willing to step aside. Mr. Goodman stated that he consents to serve as Special Administrator. The Court stated that one of the powers requested was appropriate and that the others were not as they were not necessary at this time. Mr. Skootksy presented oral to support the powers requested, spoke of the assets, the Creditors, the tax returns and the possibilty of fraudulent transfers. The Court stated that the Petition for Probate needs to be continued for proof of publication, consent of Damon Lembi to serve, or if Mr. Lembi does not consent to serve there needs to be re-publication, re-notice of the amendment and that the amendment should indicate who it is that the Petitioner would like to appoint to serve. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to August 1, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A due diligence declaration from Mr. Goodman with regard to the assets is to be filed by July 27, 2011. The Petition for Letters of Sepcial Administration is granted and terminate on August 1, 2011 with the issue of powers taken under submission for the Court to reflect on which powers to grant.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
